scripts.start: npm run clean && concurrently --kill-others -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND" -c "bgBlue,bgGreen" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm start --prefix frontend"
scripts.clean: powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000, 5000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.OwningProcess -ne 0 } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }" || exit 0
scripts.install-all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
